description: Mathematical optimization including discrete combinatorial optimization (OR-Tools), continuous convex optimization (CVXPY), and broader optimization modeling (Pyomo). Covers scheduling, routing, assignment, production planning, and objective maximization.
use_cases: Schedule workers to jobs to minimize total travel time
Pack boxes into bins with minimum wasted space
Minimize cost subject to resource constraints
Find the best portfolio allocation under risk constraints
Build a production planning model with capacity constraints
Optimize supply chain with mixed-integer decisions
example_prompts: Assign 5 workers to 5 jobs with minimum total cost
Pack 50 items of varying sizes into the fewest bins
Minimize x + 2y subject to x + y >= 10, x >= 0, y >= 0
Build a production planning model with capacity and demand constraints
Solve a mixed-integer resource allocation problem
